hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/pyproject.toml" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/pyproject.toml" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (uv venv "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/venv" && uv pip install --python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/venv/bin/python" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/pyproject.toml" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/pyproject.toml") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/pyproject.toml"
